{{ define "main" }}
{{ with .CurrentSection }}← {{ .Title }}{{ else }}{{ i18n "changelog" }}{{ end }}

{{ .Title }}

{{ with .Description }}

{{ . }}

{{ end }}
{{ .Date.Format "January 2, 2006" }} {{ with .Params.authors }} {{ range . }} {{ if reflect.IsMap . }} {{ with .image }}{{ end }} {{ .name }} {{ else }} {{ . }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ with .GetTerms "tags" }}
{{ range . }}#{{ .LinkTitle }}{{ end }}
{{ end }}
{{ .Content }}
{{- /* Prev/next within the changelog, ordered by date (oldest → newest). */ -}} {{- $pages := .CurrentSection.RegularPagesRecursive.ByDate -}} {{- $older := false -}} {{- $newer := false -}} {{- range $i, $p := $pages -}} {{- if eq $p.RelPermalink $.RelPermalink -}} {{- if gt $i 0 -}}{{- $older = index $pages (sub $i 1) -}}{{- end -}} {{- if lt (add $i 1) (len $pages) -}}{{- $newer = index $pages (add $i 1) -}}{{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{ if or $older $newer }}
{{ with $older }} ← {{ i18n "changelog_older" }} {{ .Title }} {{ else }}{{ end }} {{ with $newer }} {{ i18n "changelog_newer" }} → {{ .Title }} {{ else }}{{ end }}
{{ end }}
{{ end }}
